attributes.action: End the 3pm tv blackout for Saturday football. So pubs only can show.
attributes.additional_details: This will indirectly boost the economy by boosting pub trade across the nation. Keeping the pub and bar trade alive.
attributes.background: Allow broadcasters to give pubs and bars the right to show 3pm Saturday kick off games. Doing this will be a great way to try boost earnings and keep pubs afloat when hundreds if not thousands close to weekly.

rejection.details: Decisions about when to hold and broadcast football matches are a matter for the FA, the Premier League and the Football League, and broadcasters, not the Government or House of Commons.
